description: Specify the damping used during the background node equations of motion. By default, local damping is active with value 0.8.

keywords.name: combined
keywords.description: Specify node combined damping. f is the optional combined damping coefficient where f ≥ 0. By default, f = 0.8.

keywords.name: local
keywords.description: Specify node local damping. f is the optional local damping coefficient where f ≥ 0. By default, f = 0.8.
